config kernel="${PKG}/testdata/vmlinuz"

# By default, all environment vars are preserved
env FOO=bar BAZ=1
vimto exec -- env
stdout FOO=bar
stdout BAZ=1

# Filtering environment variables works.
config kernel="${PKG}/testdata/vmlinuz" env=["FOO","MISSING"]

vimto exec -- env
stdout FOO=bar
! stdout BAZ
! stdout MISSING
